title: Algerian Onion Fritters
description: Crispy fritters made with algerian spices and sweet caramelized onions. Perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, algerian spice mix, and onion powder.
Add sour cream and beaten egg to the bowl and mix until just combined.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry fritters until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
